title: MoreBuckets
description: The mod adds buckets from different materials
body:
# MoreBuckets
## WARNING: This mod requires [BucketLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucketlib) to work. 
![Buckets](https://i.ibb.co/pLvyg7h/Screenshot-2024-03-12-231339.png)

A mod that adds new buckets

## Crafts:
![Wooden bucket](https://i.ibb.co/PCD1Mcs/Screenshot-2024-03-13-201058.png)
![Stone bucket](https://i.ibb.co/M2vXntj/Screenshot-2024-03-12-231700.png)
![Gold bucket](https://i.ibb.co/9sGzWzJ/Screenshot-2024-03-12-231805.png)
![Diamond bucket](https://i.ibb.co/DCtSq9r/Screenshot-2024-03-12-231743.png)
## 
## Questions & Answers about the Mod.
### Q: Does this work with liquids from other mods?
A: Yes, this mod is compatible with some liquids from other mods
### Q: Does this modification work on the server?
A: This modification works on the server only if it also works on the client
### Q: I have a suggestion for the mod
A: Post a comment about your suggestion in the 'Comments' Tab
### Q: Can I use your mod for a modpack?
A: Yes, you may add this mod to any Modpack. Both for Personal and Commercial use.
### Q: I found a bug, how do I report it?
A: Post a comment about the bug in the 'Comments' Tab
### Q: I have a suggestion for the mod
A: Post a comment about your suggestion in the 'Comments' Tab
### Q: My question isn't answered here
A: Post your question in the 'Comments' Tab and I'll reply to it answering your question
